subcodes.first_line: I summon the friends of God, exalted be His glory, unto two most great commandments: first, the recognition of the Ancient Being, and second [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اولیای حق جل جلاله را بدو امر اعظم دعوت مینمایم اول معرفت ذات قدم و ثانی
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @twin duties of recognition and obedience, @love of God, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
